nl: Find all sessions in Greece in The Session
notes: Q41 = Greece. Parallel to train example 'sessions in France' but different country.

nl: Find all recordings in MusicBrainz by Miles Davis
notes: Q93341 = Miles Davis. Same pattern as Taylor Swift train example but different artist.

nl: Find all chants in Cantus DB in mixolydian mode
notes: Q735435 = Mixolydian mode. Train has Lydian mode (Q686115).

nl: Find all sources in RISM held at the British Library
notes: Q23308 = British Library. Train has BnF (Q193563).

nl: How many recordings are there in MusicBrainz for each genre?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt:  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX mb:   <https://linkedmusic.ca/graphs/musicbrainz/>
SELECT ?genre ?genreLabel (COUNT(?recording) AS ?recordingCount)
WHERE {
  GRAPH mb: {
    ?recording a mb:Recording .
    ?recording wdt:P136 ?genre .
    ?genre rdfs:label ?genreLabel .
  }
}
GROUP BY ?genre ?genreLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?recordingCount)
notes: Aggregation with GROUP BY and ORDER BY. Large result set — compare live.

nl: How many chants are there for each mode in Cantus DB?
notes: Simple aggregation on Cantus DB modes.

nl: Find the top 10 countries by number of sessions in The Session
notes: Aggregation with LIMIT. Tests whether model adds LIMIT correctly.

nl: Which RISM composers have more than 50 sources attributed to them?
notes: Tests HAVING clause with threshold filter.

nl: Find all MusicBrainz artists born in London
notes: Q84 = London. Birthplace (P19) is on Wikidata only, requires federation. Subquery before SERVICE to avoid SP031.

nl: Find all DIAMM compositions by composers born before 1400
notes: Birth date (P569) values are on Wikidata. Tests date filtering in federated context.

nl: Find all Global Jukebox songs from countries in Asia
notes: Q48 = Asia. Parallel to train 'songs from Africa' (Q15) but different continent.

nl: Find the population of countries that have events in The Session
notes: P1082 = population. Tests federation for a property not in the ontology.

nl: Find all compositions in DIAMM whose composer also appears as a composer in RISM
notes: Cross-database join via shared wdt:P2888 Wikidata URI. No federation needed.

nl: Find all recordings in The Session for tunes that share a name with a MusicBrainz work
notes: Cross-database string join. Tests case-insensitive label matching across graphs.

nl: Find all Dig That Lick tracks where the performer also has recordings in MusicBrainz
notes: Cross-database via wdt:P2888 Wikidata match on artist.

nl: Find all cultures in the Global Jukebox from countries that have at least one RISM institution
notes: Cross-database join GJ cultures to RISM institutions via country. Assumes RISM institutions have wdt:P2888 linking to Wikidata country Q-IDs.

nl: Find all tunes in The Session with 'reel' in their name
notes: Basic string matching with CONTAINS + LCASE.

nl: Find all DIAMM persons whose name contains 'Bach'
notes: String matching on person labels.

nl: Find all DIAMM compositions that do not have a genre assigned
notes: Tests FILTER NOT EXISTS pattern for negation.

nl: Find all MusicBrainz artists and their birth date if available
notes: Tests OPTIONAL pattern. LIMIT 100 to avoid huge result set.
